Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension

Class AbstractComparableVerifier<S,V extends ExtensibleComparableValidator<V,T>,T extends Comparable<? super T>>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectVerifier<S,V,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractComparableVerifier<S,V,T>
Type Parameters:
S - the type of verifier returned by the methods
V - the type of validator used by the verifier
T - the type of the value being verified
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleComparableVerifier<S,T>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractNumberVerifier, ComparableVerifierImpl, PrimitiveCharacterVerifierImpl
public abstract class AbstractComparableVerifier<S,V extends ExtensibleComparableValidator<V,T>,T extends Comparable<? super T>> extends AbstractObjectVerifier<S,V,T> implements ExtensibleComparableVerifier<S,T>
Extensible implementation of ExtensibleComparableVerifier.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    S
    isBetween(T startInclusive, T endExclusive)
    Ensures that the actual value is within range.
    S
    isBetweenClosed(T startInclusive, T endInclusive)
    Ensures that the actual value is within range.
    S
    isComparableTo(T expected)
    Ensures that the actual value is comparable to the expected value.
    S
    isComparableTo(T expected, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is comparable to the expected value.
    S
    isGreaterThan(T value)
    Ensures that the actual value is greater than the specified value.
    S
    isGreaterThan(T value, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is greater than the specified the specified value.
    S
    isGreaterThanOrEqualTo(T value)
    Ensures that the actual value is greater than or equal to the specified value.
    S
    isGreaterThanOrEqualTo(T value, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is greater than or equal to the specified value.
    S
    isLessThan(T value)
    Ensures that the actual value is less than the specified value.
    S
    isLessThan(T value, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is less than the value of the specified value.
    S
    isLessThanOrEqualTo(T value)
    Ensures that the actual value is less than or equal to the specified value.
    S
    isLessThanOrEqualTo(T value, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is less than or equal to the specified value.
    S
    isNotComparableTo(T value)
    Ensures that the actual value is not comparable to another value.
    S
    isNotComparableTo(T other, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is not comparable to another value.

      Description copied from interface: ExtensibleComparableVerifier

      Returns:

    • isBetween

      public S isBetween(T startInclusive, T endExclusive)
      Description copied from interface: ExtensibleComparableVerifier
      Ensures that the actual value is within range.
      Specified by:
      isBetween in interface ExtensibleComparableVerifier<S,V extends ExtensibleComparableValidator<V,T>>
      Parameters:
      startInclusive - the lower bound of the range (inclusive)
      endExclusive - the upper bound of the range (exclusive)
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
